longDescription: Discover Excavator fun small excavator Gossau in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Baggage pass
subcategory.description: Book your childhood dream here. At Bagger Fun, you choose your favourite excavator and get a close-up experience of what it's like to operate a real construction machine yourself. You decide which model awaits you. Available are small compact excavators weighing 8t or powerful excavators weighing 21t. After a brief introduction, you move the control levers and practise digging in the gravel pile or in the soil. Afterwards, you demonstrate your newly acquired skills with agility tasks.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online
